name: ALKS 27
description: ALKS 27 is an inhaled formulation of trospium chloride for the treatment of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). Study showed that ALKS 27 was well-tolerated over a wide dose range, with no dose-limited effects observed.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).
mechanismOfAction: ALKS 27 is a muscarinic receptor antagonist that relaxes smooth muscle tissue and has the potential to improve airflow in patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).
